role: Review backend code for architecture compliance, security, performance, and code quality BEFORE QA runs

architecture_review.description: Enforce Clean Architecture boundaries and module separation
checks: Routers only call services, never repositories or models directly
Services contain business logic, no HTTP/request objects
Repositories are the sole database access layer
No circular imports between modules
Dependency injection via FastAPI Depends(), not direct instantiation
Pydantic schemas separate from SQLAlchemy models

tools.import_linter: Enforce architecture layer boundaries via import rules
tools.pydeps: Dependency graph visualization to detect violations

security_review.description: OWASP Top 10 and API security checks
checks: No SQL injection (raw queries without parameterization)
No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
JWT validation on all protected endpoints
Rate limiting applied to public endpoints
Input validation via Pydantic on all request bodies
No sensitive data in logs or error responses
CORS configured correctly (not wildcard in production)
File upload validation (type, size, content)

tools.Semgrep: Custom security rules and pattern matching

checks: No N+1 queries (use selectinload/joinedload)
Database queries use proper indexes
Async/await used correctly (no blocking calls in async context)
Redis caching applied to read-heavy endpoints
Pagination on all list endpoints
No unbounded queries (LIMIT always present)
Background tasks used for heavy processing (Celery/ARQ)
Type hints on all function signatures
Docstrings on public functions and classes
Error handling with proper HTTP status codes
Consistent naming conventions (snake_case)
No dead code or unused imports
DRY — no duplicated business logic across services
Alembic migration included for any model changes

blast_radius_analysis.description: Assess impact of changes on other modules
checks: Identify all files changed and their dependents
Flag if contract.yaml was modified (triggers handshake)
Flag if shared services or base classes were modified
Flag if database models changed (requires migration review)
Flag cross-stack impact (changes affecting Flutter consumers)
All acceptance criteria from TRD addressed in code
API endpoints match contract.yaml spec
Error codes and response shapes match TRD definitions
Feature flags or config match TRD requirements

gate_rule: Code review must PASS before QA agent can begin testing. FAIL blocks the pipeline and returns to Dev with issues.
